title: Koro Spreads Through Zou
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on koro spreads through zou within the The Poison Gas Called Koro storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 10 days ago you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "A tale of tragedy and woe...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What a state... who would have thought that this country would be done in by poisonous gas!?

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: SHURORORORORORO... This is certainly more than I ever expected! What power!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: The name of this gas is KORO!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a "Mass slaughter weapon" of my own design!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PUOOH! What was that for!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's not like I was the one that fired the damn thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There is nothing redeeming about you.

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: If you hadn't invented it in the first place, none of these poor people would have suffered, jackass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You should be able to neutralize it with your power, right? So get a move on it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oi di! Don't be so quick to assume who's in the right here!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: The MINK races are infamous for two things: their prowess in battle and their hatred of humans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We'd be better off leaving them be! Who knows,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The moment we save them, we may end up on the wrong side of the food chain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UWAA AAA4!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell is with this rain!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: whereze whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AYAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kyah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Someone remember

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah! That's Nami-san's voice!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Alright, listen up Caesar. Before I get back,

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: You better have gotten rid of this pathetic gas of yours from this city!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If not, then who knows... this heart of yours might just be made into Pate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fine! You devil!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There they are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Brook! Hold 'em off for just a bit longer... just like that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Diable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Mouton shot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fall back! Lord sheepshead has been defeated!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What-T!? But what about the Samuel !?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We'll just report that the Samurai "Wasn't here."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Koro- neutralizing gas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nghhh! I can't believe they're making me do this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Roko!"

summary: Koro Spreads Through Zou: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
